---
<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

<img src="images/2018_jagger_goof.jpg" style = "width:25%; border:10px solid; margin-right: 20px" align="left">

My website is under construction.  In the meantime, please enjoy this dog.  


Interestingly, my great uncle Nicholas V. Riasanovsky, who was an author and Russian history professor, is cited in the article [Around the Graves of Petrovskii and Pontryagin ](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pieter_Maritz/publication/289954413_Around_the_graves_of_petrovskii_and_Pontryagin/links/57273c4708aee491cb411c28/Around-the-graves-of-petrovskii-and-Pontryagin.pdf).
